findings.description: Missing E2E test for AiContextCard — new feature (K-P3-003) has no test coverage for error/degraded cluster AI suggestion card
Missing E2E test for Command Palette recents and resource search — new features (K-P3-001) not covered by existing cmdk.spec.ts
cmdk.spec.ts uses `any` type for page parameter in getPalette helper
CommandPalette resourceItems uses verbose defensive type checks instead of proper typing from tRPC response
